violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2025
The ceiling tile above the 3-bay sink area is stained and in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the toilet room. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
The hand-washing sink in the toilet room was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
The hand-washing sink in the toilet room was lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
Establishment is lacking a garbage/refuse area. A garbage/refuse area should be available wherever garbage is generated to aid in the proper disposal of refuse. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2025
